mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_definition
AND (report_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR report_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, report_name, report_code, data_source_id, sql_content, params, description, status, mobile_enabled, report_type, allow_export_excel, allow_export_pdf, allow_print, pdf_watermark, watermark_type, create_by, create_time, update_time FROM report_definition WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY report_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_definition (report_name, report_code, data_source_id, sql_content, params, description, status, report_type, allow_export_excel, allow_export_pdf, allow_print, pdf_watermark, watermark_type, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{reportName}, #{reportCode}, #{dataSourceId}, #{sqlContent}, #{params}, #{description}, #{status}, #{reportType}, #{allowExportExcel}, #{allowExportPdf}, #{allowPrint}, #{pdfWatermark}, #{watermarkType}, #{createBy}, NOW())
